method: reverse implicit adjoint of the packed energy-gradient residual

correctness_case.physics: finite isotropic pressure, finite axial current, gauge-free lambda

anisotropic_closure_case.closure: IsotropicPressureClosure evaluated through the anisotropic functional

custom_vjp_case.forward: opaque converged host solve through jax.pure_callback

assessment: The exact reverse solve is independent of the number of physical controls. It is FD-validated with all four isotropic control groups active, with registered closure coefficients through the anisotropic functional, with bi-Maxwellian mass/hot-fraction coefficients under a valid ellipticity gate, and with tabulated parallel-pressure values while interpolation knots remain static. The public custom VJP composes the opaque host solve with the same adjoint for isotropic and anisotropic objectives. It remains matrix-free above the dense reference threshold. Three-color block Thomas is exact but takes 4.79 s versus 3.41 s for one preconditioned-GMRES right-hand side, so GMRES remains the scalar-adjoint default; block mode is retained for future batched sensitivities. Coupled free-boundary adjoints remain open.
